'''wajodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kytle|kytle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-j-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kytle|kytle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wajodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæjedheth|wæjedheth]] || [[word:wæjedhej|wæjedhej]] || [[word:wæjedhesh|wæjedhesh]] || [[word:wæjedhe|wæjedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wajojodhoth|wajojodhoth]] || [[word:wajojodhoj|wajojodhoj]] || [[word:wajojodhosh|wajojodhosh]] || [[word:wajojodho|wajojodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wajodhoth|wajodhoth]] || [[word:wajodhoj|wajodhoj]] || [[word:wajodhosh|wajodhosh]] || [[word:wajodho|wajodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wajofdhoth|wajofdhoth]] || [[word:wajofdhoj|wajofdhoj]] || [[word:wajofdhosh|wajofdhosh]] || [[word:wajofdhof|wajofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wajodhotho|wajodhotho]] || [[word:wajodhojo|wajodhojo]] || [[word:wajodhosho|wajodhosho]] || [[word:wajodhoko|wajodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wajodhoth|wajodhoth]] || [[word:wajodhoj|wajodhoj]] || [[word:wajodhosh|wajodhosh]] || [[word:wajodho|wajodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wajodhothol|wajodhothol]] || [[word:wajodhojol|wajodhojol]] || [[word:wajodhoshol|wajodhoshol]] || [[word:wajodhokol|wajodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wajodhothotho|wajodhothotho]] || [[word:wajodhojojo|wajodhojojo]] || [[word:wajodhoshosho|wajodhoshosho]] || [[word:wajodhoko|wajodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wajodhothon|wajodhothon]] || [[word:wajodhojon|wajodhojon]] || [[word:wajodhoshon|wajodhoshon]] || [[word:wajodhokon|wajodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wajodhothoro|wajodhothoro]] || [[word:wajodhojoro|wajodhojoro]] || [[word:wajodhoshoro|wajodhoshoro]] || [[word:wajodhokoro|wajodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
